title: 11 Herbal Tinctures to Soothe a Singers' Tickling Throat
description: Ephedra sinica tinctures are sometimes used to help with a tickling throat, also known as a dry cough. This is because Ephedra sinica contains compounds like ephedrine and pseudoephedrine, which have a decongestant effect. This means they can help reduce swelling in the nasal passages and sinuses, making it easier to breathe and possibly relieving a tickling throat.
